data.title: NEXUS Testnet II is closed, developer network system will be launched soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, NEXUS Testnet II was shut down at 4:00 am today, and plans to launch a developer network operating system soon, including: Devnet OS, Devnet chain and Devnet explorer.

data.title: Bitcoin's Potential Price Movement Analyzed by Trader
data.description: According to PANews, anonymous cryptocurrency trader Pentoshi has suggested that Bitcoin's return to the $106,000 range could trigger a new phase of price discovery. However, Pentoshi also noted that if Bitcoin falls below the support range of $92,000 to $94,000, the next significant support level might be around $85,000, a price not seen since November 12.

data.title: Bybit's Ethereum Reserves Show Gradual Recovery
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Julio Moreno, head of research at CryptoQuant, has reported that Bybit's Ethereum reserves are gradually recovering. Since the platform experienced a hacking incident, the net inflow has reached 139,000 ETH.

data.title: Elon Musk Announces Early Test Version Of Grok Voice Model
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk announced on social media platform X that the early test version of the Grok voice model is now available on the Grok application. Musk acknowledged that while this is an early test version and may encounter some issues, they are committed to resolving them quickly. He expressed enthusiasm about the model's capabilities despite its preliminary status.

data.title: Argentina’s Milei pushes for US trade deal at CPAC amid crypto controversy
data.description:
Argentina’s Milei wants a US-Argentia free trade deal, saying the biggest hindrance to that plan is Argentina Mercosur.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/argentinas-milei-pushes-for-us-trade-deal/

data.title: ETF approval will help Solana break the ‘memechain’ narrative
data.description:
Solana’s journey from a memecoin hub to a serious blockchain contender hinges on the approval of a Solana ETF, which would bring institutional trust and unlock its potential for large-scale financial applications like payments and trading.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/etf-approval-will-help-solana?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethena’s 328.77% network activity growth: Will ENA surge as well?
data.description:
ENA's price gains are supported by strong network growth and bullish sentiment.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethenas-328-77-network-activity-growth-will-ena-surge-as-well/

data.title: BTC must reclaim $106K before a 'new round of price discovery' — Traders
data.description:
With Bitcoin still trading below the key $100,000 level, traders say a move back to $106,000 is needed to confirm the uptrend. However, some think a dip to $85,000 is still on the table.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-reclaim-106k-price-discovery-crypto-traders-forecast?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bybit CEO Urges eXch To Rethink Stance On Hacked Funds
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 23, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou expressed on the X platform that the current situation transcends Bybit or any single entity, emphasizing the industry's collective stance against hackers. Zhou urged eXch to reconsider its position and assist in preventing the outflow of funds. He highlighted the support from Interpol and international regulatory bodies in efforts to stop these funds, which is not solely for Bybit's benefit.

Previously, it was reported that eXch declined Bybit's request to intercept the funds. A significant amount of ETH has already been laundered through eXch and converted into BTC, XMR, and other cryptocurrencies.
